argument: The claim that DataLoom raised a $4M seed round and was acquired by Cisco in 2021 is FALSE and unverified based on the available evidence. First, an EDGAR search explicitly shows that there is no record of a Form D filing for such a seed round, which raises doubts about the legitimacy of the claim that a $4M round was actually raised [source: https://efts.sec.gov/LATEST/search-index?q=%22DataLoom%22&forms=D]. Furthermore, the claimed acquisition by Cisco does not appear in any of Cisco's 2021 acquisition announcements, again suggesting that no acquisition occurred [source: https://newsroom.cisco.example/2021/acquisitions]. Without concrete evidence of either the funding or the acquisition, this assertion stands as unsubstantiated and overreaching.
